title: Audio-Language Models: How Long-Audio Understanding Works

pages.title: Why Long Audio Is Hard
pages.kicker: Hours of audio turn context length into a retrieval and evidence problem.

cards.title: Context budget
cards.body: Dense audio tokens can exhaust model windows before the recording ends.

cards.title: Chunk boundaries
cards.body: Segmentation can split events, speakers, and cross-chunk references.

cards.title: Retrieval quality
cards.body: The system must find relevant moments without losing global context.

cards.title: Grounded answers
cards.body: Every important claim should return to a timestamped source window.
